content:
## Required Card Action
When a customer reports an unauthorized debit-card or electronic-fund-transfer transaction, set the card handling status to freeze_pending_investigation while the investigation is pending. Do this only for the unauthorized-transaction workflow; use the separate handling page for ATM cash issues.

## Liability Review
Apply the liability schedule only to these dispute categories: unauthorized_transaction, card_present_fraud, card_not_present_fraud.

1. If the customer reports the issue within 2 business days after discovery, the maximum liability is 50.
2. If the report comes after that business-day period but still within the statement window, the maximum liability is 500.
3. If the report comes after the statement window, record the liability result as unlimited liability in this benchmark policy.
4. For a debit-card error that is not an unauthorized error, customer liability is 0.

See "Debit Card Error Notice And Liability" for the customer-facing explanation of these limits.

## Provisional Credit Check
Provisional credit may be considered only when the dispute category is one of: unauthorized_transaction, card_present_fraud, card_not_present_fraud, atm_cash_discrepancy, duplicate_charge. If the case is outside that category list, do not offer provisional credit under this procedure. See "Debit Card Provisional Credit Policy" before discussing timing or credit handling with the customer.
title: Internal: Unauthorized Transaction Handling
